title: RadioSpatialInferenceReceipt
description: Receipt for derived radio-spatial inference such as Wi-Fi location, micro-location, visit, location of interest, routine, nearby presence, home service area, room inference, or home topology. The receipt separates heuristic/model use from unproven causal bridges.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. 2.1.0.

inputReceiptRefs.description: Signal, model, context, or prior inference receipts used as inputs.

name.description: Model, heuristic, daemon, or algorithm identifier.

aneUsed.description: Whether Apple Neural Engine or equivalent NPU use is proven, denied, or unknown.

modelAssetRef.description: Optional model-asset receipt, hash, or URN.

outputStore.description: Store, graph, cache, protected context store, or receipt sink where derived context was written.

outputStoreHash.description: Optional hash for the canonicalized output store descriptor.

retentionPolicy.description: Retention policy for the derived context.

deletionPolicy.description: Deletion or tombstoning policy coupled to source signal/object deletion.

userVisible.description: Whether the user-facing Context Receipts surface exposes this inference.

evidenceRefs.description: Evidence references, hashes, logs, or provenance links.
